title: Quick-Fix Turkish Tuna Crumble
description: A quick and easy gluten-free-friendly dish featuring tuna that is bitter, flaky, and perfect for a quick lunch or snack.

ingredients.name: Tuna
ingredients.notes: Drain and flake the tuna into small pieces.

ingredients.name: Red pepper flakes
ingredients.notes: To taste for a slight kick of heat.

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the flaked tuna with Greek yogurt, olive oil, chopped dill, red pepper flakes, and garlic powder. Mix well until the mixture is evenly combined.
Transfer the mixture into a baking dish or shallow pan that can be used for serving.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 10-12 minutes or until the tuna crumble becomes golden brown on top and heated through.
Serve immediately while hot. This snack is best enjoyed as a side with whole wheat crackers, cucumber slices, or green vegetables.
